tasks.check: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check --all packages/pipeline/src/index.ts packages/dashboard/pipeline.types.ts packages/dashboard/pipeline-dashboard.options.ts packages/dashboard/pipeline-run.repository.ts packages/dashboard/*_test.ts packages/dashboard/test/*.ts && deno check packages/dashboard/mod.ts
tasks.test:dashboard: deno test -A packages/dashboard/*_test.ts packages/dashboard/test/resource-lifecycle_test.ts packages/dashboard/test/docker-runner_test.ts && deno run -A packages/dashboard/test/docker.ts
